## 📋 Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Follows project code style
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] No unnecessary console logs/debug code

### Testing
- [ ] Changes tested locally
- [ ] Docker Compose config verified: `docker compose ... config`
- [ ] Smoke tests pass: `scripts\smoke-test.ps1`
- [ ] New features include tests (if applicable)

### Documentation
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Breaking changes documented

### Git
- [ ] Branch created from `main`
- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] Commits are atomic and well-message
